doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No such State Bar protocol exists, and its purported waiver of UPL under B&P Code §6125 and elimination of pre-filing attorney supervision exceed the State Bar's authority.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The State Bar of California has no such protocol; the document describes a statutory UPL waiver and elimination of pre-filing attorney supervision that the State Bar lacks authority to enact and that contradicts B&P Code §6125.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such State Bar protocol exists, and its purported waiver of UPL under B&P Code §6125 and elimination of pre-filing attorney supervision exceed the State Bar's authority.
